skill.name: hexmem
skill.author: duclm1x1
skill.description: Structured memory database for AI agent identity, tasks, events, lessons, and persistent continuity. Use whenever the user says remember this, log this, track this, what should I do next, recap, summarize, what changed, or when you need to store/retrieve decisions, incidents, fleet ops notes, reminders, TODOs, goals, values, or facts about people/systems/projects across sessions.
